system.effect: Each level of Fatigue imposes a −10 penalty to all tests. When Fatigue levels equal the character's Toughness Bonus, they fall Unconscious.
system.removal: Each level of Fatigue is removed by a period of rest (typically several hours). Some levels can be removed by stimulants or medical treatment.

description.value: The character is physically worn down. Each level of Fatigue imposes a cumulative −10 penalty to all tests. Fatigue stacks with itself; a character with 3 levels of Fatigue suffers −30 to all tests. When a character's Fatigue levels equal their Toughness Bonus, they immediately fall Unconscious and cannot be roused until at least one level of Fatigue is removed.

system.notes: Track Fatigue levels via stacks. Unconsciousness occurs at TB levels of Fatigue.
